Our Story

Moments

01

1st May 2026  ·  Evening

Mehndi

We begin with the intoxicating fragrance of henna, soulful music, and the quiet joy of coming together.

Dress Code

Ladies — Green or earthy brown accents
Gents — Mint shades or smart casuals

✦ ✦ ✦
02

2nd May 2026  ·  Morning

Engagement

A sacred commitment made in the presence of loved ones, rooted in the beauty of our shared heritage.

Dress Code

Ladies — South Indian Silk Saree
Gents — South Indian Veshti & Mundu

✦ ✦ ✦
03

2nd May 2026  ·  Afternoon

Haldi

Blessing the couple with the golden warmth of turmeric — a ceremony of love, laughter, and ancient tradition.

Dress Code

Ladies — Vibrant colors: pink, blue, orange
Gents — Traditional Kurta

✦ ✦ ✦
04

2nd May 2026  ·  Night

Sangeet
& Dandiya

An evening of rhythm, dance, and sheer celebration — where two cultures come alive in one joyful night.

Dress Code

Ladies — Chaniya Choli / Lehenga / Gown
Gents — Indo-Western / Nehru Jacket Kurta

✦ ✦ ✦
05

3rd May 2026  ·  Morning & Afternoon

The Wedding

Witness the Ganesh Sthapna, the Mandva, and the sacred knot — the moment all roads have led to.

Dress Code

Strictly Traditional Attire

✦ ✦ ✦
05

9th May 2026  ·  Evening

The Reception

An evening of elegance, soft lights, and the quiet magic of a love story beautifully told.

Dress Code

No fixed attire — wear what feels stylish and true to your vibe

Venue — Reception Only
